evidence.title: README (segment 1)
evidence.excerpt: # OneLauncher | OneClient The monorepo containing the code for OneLauncher, OneClient, and their core backend.

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: ## Contributing We welcome contributions! Please read our [contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md) before getting started.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)
evidence.excerpt: If you encounter any issues, ensure that you are using the following versions (or later) of Rust, Node and Pnpm:

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: - Set an explicit version: `pnpm version:bump 1.0.0-alpha.7` - Increment using semver: `pnpm version:bump prerelease` - Preview changes only: `pnpm version:bump prerelease --dry-run`

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: ### Project Structure - **`packages/`** - Shared libraries and utilities. - [**`core/`**](./packages/core/) - Launcher Core. This is the library that contains the entire launcher logic. - [**`entity/`**](./packages/entity/) - Contains entity definitions used in the launcher's database. - [**`macro/`**](./packages/macro/) - Contains macro definitions to simplify some code. - [**`scripts/`**](./packages/scripts/) - General scripts for CI/CD or development environments. - [**`web_common/`**](./packages/web_common/) - Contains common web code used by both OneLauncher and OneClient. - **`apps/`** - [**`onelauncher/`**](./apps/onelauncher/) - **`desktop/`** - Tauri desktop application. - **`frontend/`** - React SPA frontend. - **`distribution/`** - Files used for release builds. - [**`oneclient/`**](./apps/oneclient/) - **`desktop/`** - Tauri desktop application. - **`frontend/`** - React SPA frontend. - **`distribution/`** - Files used for release builds.

evidence.title: oneclient-1.1.2
evidence.excerpt: - Fix library downloading - Fix onboarding / migrating again - Add fabric loader updating - Fix rare frontend crash - Fix onboarded clusters not automatically being considered during migration checks - Fix 26.1 launch crash

evidence.title: oneclient-1.1.0
evidence.excerpt: - Add support for new 26.x versioning scheme - Add migration GUI for new versions - Improve onboarding design significantly - Fix Linux window bar - Cache all background art - Fix resource pack compatibility check - Add AUR build # How to install If you're on Windows, download the file that ends with `.exe` If you're on macOS, download the file that ends with `.dmg` If you're on Linux, read [this guide](https://polyfrost.org/projects/oneclient/linux) to see install options.

evidence.title: oneclient-1.0.3
evidence.excerpt: - Fix memory setting not updating - Update changelog fetch URL to DataStorage repo - Fix default categories always being selected - Improve debug # How to install If you're on Windows, download the file that ends with `.exe` If you're on macOS, download the file that ends with `.dmg` If you're on Linux, read [this guide](https://polyfrost.org/projects/oneclient/linux) to see install options.
